zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Kary於大約1170年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Henry Lovel Lord of Cary11168歲，母親Alis Cary27歲。他於1199年與Anne Trivett在英國薩默塞特卡素 加里結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1261年在他的家鄉享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Kary于大约1170年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Henry Lovel Lord of Cary11168岁，母亲Alis Cary27岁。他于1199年与Anne Trivett在英国薩默塞特卡素 加里结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1261年在他的家乡享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: variant of   Carey  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Carey
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ciardha, a midland surname meaning ‘descendant of Ciardha’, a personal name derived from ciar ‘dark, black’. See Kerry .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhiachra ‘son of Fiachra’.

English: from Carey Barton in Devon or Castle Cary, Lytes Cary, Cary Fitzpaine, or Babcary, all in Somerset, named for the rivers on which they stand; both river names probably derive from the Celtic root car- ‘love, liking’, perhaps with the meaning ‘pleasant stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Kary was born about 1170, in Devon, England, his father, Henry Lovel Lord of Cary, was 11168 and his mother, Alis Cary, was 27. He married Anne Trivett in 1199, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1261, in his hometown, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Kary est né environ 1170, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Henry Lovel Lord of Cary, avait 11168 ans et sa mère, Alis Cary, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Anne Trivett en 1199, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1261, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 92 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Karyが約1170年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Henry Lovel Lord of Caryは11168歳，母Alis Caryは27歳であった。1199年にイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイでAnne Trivettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1261年に故郷で92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Kary(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Lovel Lord of Cary(은)는 11168세였고, 그의 어머니 Alis Cary(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1199년 영국 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 Anne Trivett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1261년 그의 고향에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Kary родился около 1170 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Lovel Lord of Cary было 11168 лет, а матери, которую звали Alis Cary, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Trivett в 1199 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1261 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 92 лет.
